projects.name: Ali-hey-0/audio-ai-field-guide

projects.full_description: A mental-model-first field guide to Audio AI — from raw waveforms to production voice systems. projects.name: rockerritesh/nlp-remove-jspace-layer
projects.description: Topic information becomes decodable within the first few layers and stays decodable everywhere (kNN ≈ 0.9 from layer 2 on). Yet through the first half of the network the classes are visually entangled — they collapse onto overlapping manifolds (silhouette ≈ 0) — and only re-separate into clean clusters in the second half.
projects.full_description: Topic information becomes decodable within the first few layers and stays decodable everywhere (kNN ≈ 0.9 from layer 2 on). Yet through the first half of the network the classes are visually entangled — they collapse onto overlapping manifolds (silhouette ≈ 0) — and only re-separate into clean clusters in the second half.
